title: Basic Plan
content: Basic Plan costs $29 per month and includes 10 videos per month with 720p export resolution.

title: Pro Plan
content: Pro Plan costs $79 per month and includes unlimited videos, 4K export resolution, and AI captions.

title: Refund Policy
content: AutoStream does not offer refunds after 7 days from purchase.

title: Support Policy
content: 24/7 support is available only for customers on the Pro plan.
